Name: InsForge
Tagline: Give agents everything they need to ship fullstack apps
Topics: Open Source, Developer Tools, GitHub, Database
Description: InsForge is the backend built for agentic development. We offer everything AI agents need to build fullstack apps that scale. Our open source backend (2.3K stars on GitHub) provides databases, auth, storage, model gateway and edge functions accessible through a semantic layer that agents can understand, reason about, and operate end to end. Say the word, and you can deploy to InsForge Cloud or your own domain.

Name: Cardboard
Tagline: Cursor for video editing
Description: Cardboard is an agentic video editor that gets you from raw footage to final cut in minutes. Think of it like an intelligent collaborator, one that understands what's in your clips, has the taste to know what a good edit looks like, and executes your vision.

Name: Teract AI
Tagline: Your AI reputation coach for LinkedIn, X, Reddit & more
Description: Teract learns your voice, scans your feeds, and tells you exactly where to show up online. It finds high-impact conversations across platforms like LinkedIn, X, and Reddit, then drafts thoughtful comments and posts that reflect your real voice and experience.

Name: OpenUI
Tagline: The open standard for Generative UI
Topics: Open Source, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub
Description: The Open Standard for Generative UIMake your AI apps respond with interactive UI components like cards, tables, forms and charts instead of text. Streaming-native, token-efficient, and works with any AI model (GPT,Claude,M2.5) and agent framework like ai-sdk, Google ADK

Name: Gemini Embedding 2
Tagline: Google's first natively multimodal embedding model
Description: Gemini Embedding 2 is Google's first natively multimodal embedding model that maps text, images, video, audio and documents into a single embedding space, enabling multimodal retrieval and classification across different types of media and it’s available now in public preview.

Name: Knowlify
Tagline: Convert text & PDFs into premium explainer videos
Description: Knowlify is an AI video studio that turns docs into premium explainer videos. Built for teams that need consistent, high-impact explainers - faster than traditional production, more engaging than standard AI video tools.

Name: IonRouter
Tagline: Serve Any AI Model, Faster & Cheaper
Description: Teams use IonRouter as a drop‑in OpenAI-compatible API to hit the best open models for LLMs, vision, video, and TTS at HALF market rate. You can run agents and multi‑modal apps, and deploy your finetunes on our fleet while we handle optimization and scaling in the background. Under the hood, IonRouter runs a custom inference engine (IonAttention) built for NVIDIA Grace Hopper, cutting price and latency for your workloads.

Name: Firecrawl CLI
Tagline: The complete web data toolkit for AI agents
Description: Firecrawl CLI is an all-in-one toolkit for scraping, searching, and browsing the web. Built for AI agents and developers, it delivers clean, reliable data with maximum token efficiency - outperforming native Claude Code fetch with >80% coverage.

Name: ChatGPT Interactive Learning
Tagline: Learn math and science with interactive visual explanations
Description: 140M people already use ChatGPT to solve math and science problems. Now it actually shows you. Interactive Learning brings dynamic visual explanations to topics like the Pythagorean theorem, Ohm's law, and compound interest, no textbook required.

Name: Citable
Tagline: Be in AI answers before your competitors. We do it for you.
Description: Your competitors are already showing up in ChatGPT and Perplexity. Citable is the only fully managed GEO agency built for SMBs: we handle your AI search strategy, content, and citation building from day one. Just a dedicated team that makes AI recommend your business.

Name: TADA
Tagline: 1:1 text-acoustic alignment for 5x faster speech generation
Description: TADA (Text-Acoustic Dual Alignment) is Hume AI's open-source speech-language model that synchronizes text and audio one-to-one. TADA synchronizes text and speech into a single continuous stream via 1:1 token alignment. Generating audio at 5x the speed of conventional LLM-based TTS systems completely eliminates skipped words and content hallucinations across 1000+ tests.

Name: ELVES
Tagline: Summon your army of elves
Topics: Open Source, Developer Tools, GitHub, Vibe coding
Description: Switching between AI coding agents is chaos. ELVES gives them a shared workspace, shared memory, and a single place to ship from. Works with Claude Code & Codex!

Name: Nativeline AI + Cloud
Tagline: Native Swift apps + a real cloud database. One prompt away.
Description: The only native Swift AI app builder with a real cloud database built in. iPhone, iPad, and Mac. AR, Siri, Liquid Glass, menu bar apps, Apple Maps, every Apple framework. Describe your app, watch it build, build your database with a prompt. Auth, storage, functions, analytics, all inside one platform. No Supabase. No Firebase. No Xcode. Your app and your backend. One platform to App Store.

Name: Mindspase
Tagline: A visual AI knowledge base that organizes what you save
Description: Mindspase is a visual, AI-powered knowledge base that automatically organizes everything you save, articles, images, videos, music, quotes, PDFs, with zero folders or manual tagging. Search the way you actually remember things: "that blue design article from last month." Features unique visual layout, natural language + visual search, Collective Minds for shared knowledge spaces, and full end-to-end encryption. No ads. No data selling. Ever.

Name: Typinator 10
Tagline: The fast and private text expander for macOS and iOS
Description: Turn repetitive typing into instant text shortcuts. Save hours every week. Works in every app, keeps your data private. Trusted by individuals and teams. Now available on iOS.

Name: Product Workbench for Claude Code
Tagline: Turn feature ideas into stakeholder-ready code prototypes
Description: Chordio helps PMs and designers prototype directly on their product even in complex enterprise environments. It runs in Claude Code and starts with cloning the front-end of the product and relevant context into a dedicated repository to enable prototyping securely in minutes with no heavy setup. It ships with built-in agent skills and a local dashboard to help with research, prototype, review, and stakeholder communication to support the full workflow from concept to a “ship it” decision.

Name: ScreenGeany AI
Tagline: Ask AI about anything on your screen with a single hotkey
Description: Ask AI about anything on your screen. One hotkey captures your display and gets an instant answer from Claude or GPT — right on top of your current app. No screenshots saved, no copy-pasting, no tab-switching. Free plan: 10 queries/month, no key needed. Pro: 200 queries + BYOK unlimited. Screenshots stay in RAM only — never stored. Supports Claude Haiku, Sonnet, Opus & GPT-4o. macOS 12+.

Name: CodeYam CLI & Memory
Tagline: Comprehensive memory management for Claude Code
Description: We built CodeYam Memory because Claude Code kept repeating the same mistakes and our claude.md files got stale. CodeYam Memory uses a background agent to review your coding session transcripts, identifies confusion patterns, and generates targeted rules with proper scoping. This is a small first step towards our vision of exploring the ideal AI-native development experience, packaged as a lightweight CLI that you can use wherever you use Claude Code.

Name: HypeScribe
Tagline: Google Drive for Your Speech w/ 99% AI transcription
Description: HypeScribe provides fast and accurate transcription for your audio and video, including direct support for social media links from platforms like YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok. We also offer a dedicated notetaker for your meetings on Google Meet, Zoom, and Teams, with upcoming integrations like Google Drive to centralize all your speech data.

Name: MorphMind Launches Steerable AI Platform
Tagline: Build a team of AI specialists that deliver quality work
Description: MorphMind turns AI from a black-box chatbot into a team of customizable AI specialists you can actually steer. Build expert teams, assign roles, inspect their work, jump in to guide them, and reuse what they learn across projects. Instead of just accepting or rejecting an answer, you can question reasoning, redo specific steps, and keep a traceable trail of sources and computations. We built MorphMind for people who want AI that is not only powerful, but steerable.
